items.title: Glow emerges from stealth at $1.2B valuation to challenge endpoint security in the AI era
items.summary: Glow is targeting a new class of endpoint risks created by the rapid adoption of AI agents and developer tools inside enterprises.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: A Teen Reporter Searched for His Community in the Epstein Files. Adults Freaked Out
items.summary: An Instagram post turned one California student newspaper into a free-speech flash point. The students say they were just doing their homework.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Anthropic sued by University of Tennessee Research Foundation over alleged patent infringement
items.summary: Anthropic disagreed with the allegations and stated its intentions to defend the case “vigorously,” according to a spokesperson quoted by Reuters
